seo_description: The 1981 Inventions DRV is a modern distortion pedal inspired by the classic ProCo RAT circuit, refined for clarity, balance, and studio-grade tone. Designed by Matthew Hoopes, the DRV delivers a wide gain range that moves from gritty overdrive to saturated distortion while maintaining exceptional note definition. The simple three-knob layout (Volume, Tone, Drive) makes it easy to dial in tight rhythm tones, articulate lead sounds, or thick, punchy distortion for modern pedalboards. What sets the DRV apart is its carefully tuned EQ and dynamic response, allowing it to cut through a mix without sounding harsh or muddy. Guitarists appreciate its ability to stack well with other pedals and its consistent performance across different amps. Built with premium components and housed in a durable enclosure, the DRV has become a favorite among boutique pedal enthusiasts and professional players alike. Discover tones, settings, and pedalboard combinations for the 1981 Inventions DRV on PedalPlex.

The 1981 Inventions DRV (Hyperfade White) is a special finish version of the acclaimed DRV distortion pedal, known for its articulate gain and refined take on the classic RAT-style circuit. Delivering everything from gritty drive to full-bodied distortion, the DRV is designed to retain clarity and punch even at higher gain settings. The three-knob interface—Volume, Tone, and Drive—offers precise control over output level, brightness, and saturation. Players value the DRV for its tight low end, smooth clipping character, and the way it preserves the character of the guitar and amplifier. Whether used as a main distortion or stacked with boosts and overdrives, it maintains excellent note definition and dynamic response. The Hyperfade White finish adds a distinctive aesthetic to an already sought-after boutique pedal. Explore tones, settings, and pedalboard combinations for the 1981 Inventions DRV on PedalPlex.

Friedman Smallbox amplifier delivers classic British-inspired tube tones with dynamic response and powerful high-gain capabilities.
Fulltone OCD Overdrive Ge features germanium clipping for warm, responsive overdrive tones with dynamic sensitivity.
Fulltone OCD V2 offers versatile overdrive with amp-like response, delivering everything from light breakup to powerful crunch.
Hotone Choir Chorus provides lush modulation with rich stereo-style chorus textures in a compact pedal format.
Hotone Chunk delivers aggressive distortion tones designed for heavy rock and metal guitar sounds.
Hotone Eko Delay blends digital clarity with analog warmth, producing versatile echo textures for modern guitar setups.
Hotone Fat Buffer/Preamp strengthens your guitar signal while adding subtle tonal enhancement for long pedal chains.
Hotone Gate Noise Gate removes unwanted noise and hum while maintaining the natural dynamics of your guitar signal.
Hotone Komp Compressor provides smooth sustain and balanced dynamics for clean and lead guitar tones.
Hotone Liftup Clean Boost increases signal level without coloring your tone, perfect for solos and amp pushing.
Hotone Soul Press II combines wah, volume, and expression control in one compact multifunction pedal.

pedalplex_id: Hotone Tuner Press Volume Expression Buffer
seo_description: Hotone Tuner Press combines tuner, volume pedal, expression controller, and buffer in a compact multifunction design.
Hotone Wally Looper offers simple loop recording with high-quality audio for practice and creative layering.
Hotone Wally+ Looper expands looping capabilities with extended recording time and improved functionality.
Hudson Broadcast AP-II recreates vintage recording console saturation with dynamic overdrive and harmonic richness.
Hudson Broadcast Mk I delivers studio-style transformer saturation for unique overdrive textures.
Grandmeister Deluxe 40 is a programmable tube amplifier delivering versatile high-quality guitar tones.
Spirit of Metal provides compact amplifier power with aggressive high-gain tones for metal guitar.
Spirit of Rock delivers classic rock amplifier tones in a compact pedal-style amplifier format.
Spirit of Vintage produces warm vintage-style amplifier tones inspired by classic tube circuits.
Triamp Mark 3 is a professional multi-channel tube amplifier offering exceptional tonal versatility.
Tubemeister Deluxe 20 delivers authentic tube amp tone with modern features for recording and live performance.
Tubemeister Deluxe 40 offers powerful tube amplification with versatile channel options.
Ibanez Analog Delay Mini provides warm bucket-brigade style delay tones in a compact pedal format.
Ibanez Bigmini Chromatic Tuner offers accurate tuning with a bright display and compact footprint.
Ibanez Booster Mini delivers clean signal amplification with minimal tonal coloration.
Ibanez Chorus Mini provides classic chorus modulation with warm and shimmering textures.
Ibanez DDL10 Delay II offers classic digital delay sounds from the vintage 10 Series pedal lineup.
Ibanez DFL FL301 delivers vintage digital flanger modulation with sweeping jet-like textures.
Ibanez FL301-DX enhances the original digital flanger design with extended modulation control.
Ibanez DFL Flanger produces classic swirling modulation effects ideal for rock and experimental tones.
Ibanez Echo Shifter ES3 combines analog-style delay with modulation for rich echo textures.
Ibanez FL9 is a legendary analog flanger known for warm modulation and classic jet-like sweep.
Ibanez Flanger Mini recreates classic analog flanger tones in a compact pedal design.
Ibanez Pentatone Equalizer offers detailed tone shaping with multiple EQ bands for precise control.
Ibanez Pentatone Gate removes unwanted noise and hum while preserving guitar dynamics.
Ibanez Pentatone Preamp provides versatile preamp tones with extensive tone shaping options.
Ibanez Phaser Mini offers classic phasing modulation with warm analog-style movement.
Ibanez Super Metal Mini delivers high-gain distortion tones designed for modern metal guitar.
Ibanez Tremolo Mini provides classic tremolo modulation with simple controls and compact size.
Ibanez Tube Screamer Mini delivers the legendary mid-focused overdrive tone in a compact pedal format.
Ibanez TS808 Tube Screamer is one of the most iconic overdrive pedals, known for smooth midrange boost. If there is something green on a pedalboard, it is likely a T808.
Ibanez TS808DX combines the classic Tube Screamer circuit with additional boost functionality.
Ibanez TS808HWV2 is a hand-wired version of the classic Tube Screamer for premium analog tone.
Ibanez TS9 Tube Screamer delivers the legendary overdrive sound used by countless guitarists worldwide. If there is something green on a pedalboard, it is likely a TS9.

The Ibanez Tube Screamer TS9B is a bass-oriented version of the legendary Tube Screamer circuit, engineered to deliver classic mid-focused drive while preserving the low-end clarity essential for bass players. Unlike traditional overdrives, the TS9B includes dedicated bass and treble controls to shape the frequency response while maintaining tight punch and definition. It produces warm, tube-like saturation that enhances articulation without overwhelming the fundamental tone. This makes it ideal for modern bass rigs as well as guitar setups that benefit from thicker low frequencies. The TS9B keeps the recognizable Tube Screamer character while offering expanded tonal flexibility for studio, stage, and pedalboard applications.

The Ibanez Tube Screamer TS9DX Turbo Tube Screamer expands the classic TS9 formula with multiple clipping modes for greater tonal versatility. In addition to the traditional Tube Screamer sound, the pedal features turbo modes that increase gain, output, and low-end response for thicker distortion textures. This allows players to move from smooth blues overdrive to heavier rock tones while retaining the signature midrange boost that defines the Tube Screamer family. The TS9DX works equally well as a standalone overdrive or as a boost pushing a driven amplifier. With its flexible gain structure and recognizable tone profile, it remains one of the most adaptable versions of the iconic Tube Screamer design.

The Ibanez Twin Peaks TWP10 is a unique wah pedal designed to provide two distinct sweep characters within a single unit. Players can switch between low and high peak modes, allowing for subtle vintage-style wah tones or more aggressive and pronounced filtering. This dual-voice design makes the pedal suitable for a wide range of styles, from funk rhythms to expressive rock solos. The Twin Peaks circuit offers smooth frequency transitions and responsive dynamics that follow the player’s picking intensity. Built with Ibanez’s reliable construction, the TWP10 delivers expressive wah performance while expanding the tonal possibilities beyond traditional wah pedals.

The Ibanez WH10V3 is the modern reissue of the famous wah pedal associated with John Frusciante. This third version retains the distinctive wide sweep and vocal character of the original while improving durability and output consistency. It features dedicated modes for both guitar and bass, allowing players to adapt the wah response to different instruments and frequency ranges. The adjustable depth control lets users fine-tune the intensity of the wah effect, making it possible to achieve subtle tonal movement or dramatic filtering. Known for its expressive feel and musical sweep, the WH10V3 continues the legacy of one of the most recognizable wah pedals in alternative and funk rock tones.

The JHS 424 Gain Stage is a versatile overdrive designed to replicate the dynamic saturation of vintage recording equipment and classic amplifier circuits. Its wide gain range allows guitarists to move from subtle edge-of-breakup tones to thick, harmonically rich drive. The pedal responds naturally to picking dynamics and guitar volume adjustments, making it ideal for expressive playing styles. Its tonal structure emphasizes clarity and articulation while adding warmth and harmonic complexity. The 424 Gain Stage works well both as a primary overdrive and as part of a stacked gain setup, making it a flexible addition to modern pedalboards.

The JHS Angry Charlie v3 is a high-gain distortion pedal designed to recreate the aggressive tone of a classic British amplifier stack. Known for its thick saturation and powerful midrange presence, the pedal delivers heavy rock tones while maintaining strong note clarity. The three-band EQ section provides precise control over bass, mid, and treble frequencies, allowing players to tailor the distortion to their guitar and amplifier setup. From crunchy rhythm tones to powerful lead sounds, the Angry Charlie is capable of covering a wide range of modern rock applications. Its amp-like response and articulate gain structure have made it one of the most popular distortion pedals in the JHS lineup.

The JHS Artificial Blonde is a modulation pedal designed to recreate the authentic vibrato circuit found in vintage brownface Fender amplifiers. Unlike chorus effects, this circuit produces true pitch vibrato by subtly shifting the pitch of the signal rather than blending delayed copies. The result is a smooth, warm modulation that adds movement and depth to clean guitar tones. Controls allow players to adjust the speed and intensity of the effect, making it suitable for subtle vintage shimmer or deeper psychedelic modulation. The Artificial Blonde is particularly popular among surf, indie, and ambient players seeking authentic vintage-style vibrato tones.

The JHS Bonsai Overdrive is a multi-mode pedal that brings together nine legendary Tube Screamer style circuits into a single compact unit. Each mode recreates a different historical variation of the iconic overdrive design, ranging from early vintage models to boutique interpretations. This allows players to quickly explore different clipping structures and tonal characteristics without needing multiple pedals. The Bonsai can deliver everything from subtle blues breakup to thicker modern overdrive textures. With its wide range of classic tones and intuitive switching system, the Bonsai has become a favorite among players who appreciate the history and versatility of the Tube Screamer sound.

The JHS Charlie Brown v4 is designed to emulate the warm, organic breakup of classic British plexi-style amplifiers. Rather than aggressive distortion, it focuses on natural amp-like overdrive that responds dynamically to playing style and guitar volume changes. The gain range covers everything from light crunch to classic rock saturation, making it ideal for vintage-inspired tones. Its simple control layout allows players to shape the high-end response while preserving the characteristic warmth of the circuit. For guitarists looking to capture classic Marshall-style tones at manageable volumes, the Charlie Brown v4 offers a convincing and musical solution.

The JHS Cheese Ball is a vintage-inspired fuzz and distortion pedal modeled after rare British fuzz circuits from the late 1960s and early 1970s. It delivers thick, saturated fuzz tones with a distinctive midrange character and a slightly gated texture when pushed harder. The pedal includes multiple clipping modes that allow players to move between smooth fuzz sustain and more aggressive distortion-style tones. This flexibility makes it suitable for garage rock, psychedelic music, and modern alternative styles. With its unique voice and dynamic response, the Cheese Ball captures the quirky charm of vintage fuzz designs while remaining highly usable in contemporary pedalboard setups.

The JHS 3 Series Chorus is designed to provide lush, musical modulation while maintaining a straightforward control layout. It offers classic chorus textures that range from subtle shimmering movement to deeper, more pronounced modulation. The pedal includes controls for rate and depth, allowing players to fine-tune the speed and intensity of the effect. A dedicated toggle switch adds additional tonal variation, expanding the range of usable chorus sounds. Built as part of the affordable JHS 3 Series lineup, this pedal delivers high-quality modulation tones in a simple and reliable format suitable for both studio and live environments.

The JHS Colour Box 10 is a studio-grade preamp and tone shaping pedal inspired by classic recording console circuitry. It delivers transformer-style saturation and powerful EQ shaping, allowing musicians to add warmth, grit, or subtle harmonic coloration to their signal. The pedal can function as a guitar preamp, DI box, recording tool, or even a creative saturation device for other instruments. Its flexible controls allow users to push the circuit into mild drive or aggressive distortion while maintaining excellent tonal clarity. Because of its studio heritage, the Colour Box 10 is widely used not only by guitarists but also by producers and engineers seeking analog character.

The original JHS Colour Box v1 is a studio-inspired preamp pedal that recreates the sound and saturation characteristics of vintage recording console circuits. It offers powerful EQ controls and gain staging options that allow players to move from clean signal boosting to heavy analog distortion. The pedal can be used as a guitar preamp, direct recording interface, or tone shaping tool for various instruments. Its unique circuit design provides thick harmonic coloration and transformer-style saturation that adds character to otherwise clean signals. Because of its versatility and distinctive sound, the Colour Box v1 quickly became a favorite among musicians and recording engineers.

The JHS Colour Box v2 expands on the original design by offering additional gain range, improved noise performance, and expanded EQ capabilities. Inspired by classic studio console circuits, it allows users to shape tone with precision while adding analog warmth and saturation. The pedal can be used as a high-quality guitar preamp, a DI box for recording, or a creative tone-shaping device for keyboards, bass, and vocals. With its ability to move from subtle coloration to aggressive distortion, the Colour Box v2 is one of the most flexible analog preamp pedals available today.

The JHS 3 Series Compressor is a simple yet powerful dynamics pedal designed to deliver smooth sustain and balanced signal levels. It features intuitive controls that allow players to adjust compression intensity and output volume without complex setup. The pedal enhances note clarity and sustain, making it ideal for clean rhythm playing, country lead tones, and expressive fingerstyle guitar. A toggle switch adds additional tonal flexibility, letting players adjust the feel of the compression response. As part of the JHS 3 Series lineup, it focuses on high-quality sound and reliability while maintaining an accessible design.

The JHS 3 Series Delay provides versatile digital delay sounds with an emphasis on clarity and musical repeat textures. Players can adjust delay time, feedback, and mix levels to create everything from short slapback echoes to spacious ambient delays. The pedal includes a toggle switch that introduces additional tonal variation, allowing for darker analog-style repeats when desired. Its simple control layout makes it easy to dial in useful delay tones quickly. Designed to be affordable yet professional, the 3 Series Delay is suitable for beginners and experienced players alike.

The JHS 3 Series Distortion is a straightforward high-gain pedal designed to deliver powerful and articulate distortion tones. Its gain structure allows players to move from tight crunchy rhythm tones to heavier saturated lead sounds. The tone control provides flexibility to match different guitars and amplifiers while maintaining clarity and punch. A toggle switch adds extra voicing options, expanding the range of distortion textures available. As part of the minimalist 3 Series lineup, the pedal focuses on high-quality sound while keeping controls simple and intuitive.

The JHS 3 Series Flanger produces classic jet-like modulation effects inspired by vintage analog flanger pedals. It allows players to control the speed and depth of the modulation to achieve subtle movement or dramatic sweeping textures. The pedal can add dimension to clean guitar tones or create dramatic modulation in distorted sounds. A toggle switch expands the tonal palette, offering additional variations in the flanger character. Built for simplicity and reliability, it delivers classic modulation tones in an accessible format.

The JHS Flight Delay Blue is a compact digital delay designed for clear, musical echo effects with intuitive controls. It offers a range of delay times suitable for slapback, rhythmic repeats, and ambient textures. The pedal maintains excellent signal clarity even with higher feedback settings. Its streamlined design makes it ideal for pedalboards where space is limited while still delivering professional delay sounds.

The JHS Flight Delay White is a streamlined delay pedal designed for musicians who want high-quality echo effects in a compact format. It delivers crisp repeats with adjustable feedback and delay time settings, making it suitable for subtle rhythmic echoes or spacious ambient textures. Its straightforward control layout allows players to dial in usable sounds quickly during rehearsals or live performances. Despite its minimal design, the pedal produces rich delay tones that integrate well with both clean and driven guitar signals. The Flight Delay White is ideal for players seeking reliable delay functionality without complex programming or excessive controls.

The JHS 3 Series Fuzz is a versatile fuzz pedal that captures the thick, saturated character of classic vintage fuzz circuits while keeping the controls simple and accessible. It delivers rich sustain, strong harmonic content, and a wide gain range that can move from smooth vintage fuzz to more aggressive modern textures. Players can adjust the fuzz intensity and tone shaping to suit different guitars and amplifiers. A toggle switch introduces an additional voicing option, expanding the tonal possibilities without complicating the interface. The 3 Series Fuzz offers authentic fuzz character in a compact and affordable pedal format.

The JHS 3 Series Hall Reverb provides spacious ambient reverb inspired by large concert halls and studio reverberation units. It is designed to add depth and dimension to guitar tones without overwhelming the natural character of the instrument. Players can control the reverb mix and decay length to achieve subtle ambience or expansive atmospheric textures. The pedal includes a toggle switch that alters the reverb character for additional tonal flexibility. With its simple layout and high-quality sound, the Hall Reverb 3 Series is ideal for guitarists who want lush ambience in an easy-to-use pedal.

The JHS Hard Drive is a powerful distortion pedal inspired by classic British amplifier tones. It produces thick, saturated gain with strong midrange presence and tight low-end response. The circuit is designed to deliver articulate distortion that maintains clarity even with high gain settings. Players can shape the overall tone to suit different guitars, amplifiers, and musical styles. From crunchy rhythm parts to soaring lead tones, the Hard Drive provides a versatile distortion voice that fits naturally into rock and modern alternative guitar setups.

The JHS Hard Drive Tan offers the same aggressive distortion character as the original Hard Drive while featuring a distinctive alternate finish. It delivers thick gain structure with detailed articulation and strong harmonic presence. The pedal is capable of producing everything from tight rhythm crunch to saturated lead tones suitable for heavier rock styles. Its responsive dynamics allow players to control the intensity of the distortion through picking attack and guitar volume adjustments. With its powerful tone and straightforward controls, the Hard Drive Tan provides reliable distortion performance in both studio and live environments.

The JHS 3 Series Harmonic Trem recreates the harmonic tremolo effect originally found in certain vintage amplifier circuits. Unlike traditional tremolo, harmonic tremolo alternates between high and low frequencies to create a swirling, almost phaser-like modulation. The result is a rich and dimensional effect that adds movement and complexity to guitar tones. Players can adjust the speed and intensity of the modulation to achieve subtle rhythmic pulses or dramatic vintage-style textures. The Harmonic Trem 3 Series offers this classic modulation style in a simple and accessible pedal format.

The JHS Morning Glory v4 is one of the most popular transparent overdrive pedals on the market. Designed to emulate the subtle breakup of a vintage amplifier pushed to its sweet spot, it enhances the natural tone of the guitar rather than heavily coloring it. The pedal delivers articulate low-gain drive with excellent note definition and dynamic response. A high-gain toggle expands the available gain range, allowing players to move from gentle edge-of-breakup tones to slightly more saturated overdrive. The Morning Glory works exceptionally well as a foundation drive or as a stacking pedal in complex gain setups.

The JHS Muffuletta is a multi-mode fuzz pedal that recreates several famous Big Muff style circuits within a single enclosure. Each mode represents a different historical variation of the iconic fuzz design, allowing players to explore multiple tonal characters without switching pedals. The pedal delivers thick sustain, powerful low-end response, and rich harmonic distortion typical of classic fuzz circuits. Guitarists can quickly move between vintage and modern Muff voices depending on the musical context. With its versatility and authentic fuzz textures, the Muffuletta has become a favorite among players who appreciate the history of fuzz pedals.

The JHS Notadümblë is an overdrive pedal inspired by the tonal characteristics of rare boutique amplifier circuits known for their smooth sustain and rich harmonic response. It delivers a refined overdrive that blends clarity with warmth, making it ideal for expressive lead playing and dynamic rhythm work. The circuit emphasizes touch sensitivity, allowing players to control the gain structure through picking dynamics and guitar volume adjustments. Its balanced frequency response helps it integrate easily with a variety of amplifier setups. The Notadümblë provides boutique-style drive tones in a compact stompbox format.

The JHS Notaklön is a tongue-in-cheek tribute to one of the most famous transparent overdrive circuits ever created. Designed with the same spirit of clarity and dynamic response, it provides a clean boost and light overdrive that enhances the natural tone of the guitar and amplifier. The pedal emphasizes headroom, articulation, and a subtle midrange presence that helps guitars sit well in a mix. It works particularly well as a boost pushing tube amplifiers or stacking with other drive pedals. Despite its playful name, the Notaklön offers professional-level tone shaping for modern pedalboards.

The JHS 3 Series Octave Reverb combines ambient reverb textures with an added octave effect that creates lush, atmospheric soundscapes. The octave layer introduces an ethereal shimmer above the original signal, making it particularly effective for ambient guitar styles and cinematic textures. Players can adjust the reverb mix and decay length to control how prominent the effect becomes in the signal chain. The pedal retains the straightforward control philosophy of the 3 Series lineup while delivering expansive sonic possibilities. It is ideal for musicians exploring ambient, post-rock, or experimental sound design.

The JHS 3 Series Oil Can Delay is inspired by vintage oil can delay units known for their dark, warbly echo character. Unlike pristine digital delays, this circuit introduces subtle modulation and tonal coloration that give repeats a nostalgic lo-fi quality. The pedal can create everything from short slapback echoes to atmospheric vintage delays with unique character. Players can adjust delay time, feedback, and mix to shape the overall effect. The Oil Can Delay offers a distinctive alternative to traditional delay designs while maintaining the simplicity of the JHS 3 Series format.

The JHS 3 Series Overdrive is a versatile drive pedal designed to provide natural, amp-like breakup across a wide gain range. It can produce subtle edge-of-breakup tones, warm blues overdrive, or thicker rock crunch depending on the gain settings. The tone control allows players to balance brightness and warmth to suit their rig. A toggle switch adds additional clipping variation, expanding the tonal range of the pedal. Built with the simple philosophy of the 3 Series lineup, it delivers professional overdrive tones in an accessible format.

The JHS Overdrive Preamp is designed to replicate the tonal behavior of classic amplifier preamp sections. It adds harmonic saturation and warmth while providing enough gain to function as both a boost and a primary drive pedal. The circuit emphasizes dynamic response, allowing players to control the amount of breakup through picking intensity. Its balanced EQ response makes it easy to integrate with a wide variety of guitars and amplifiers. The Overdrive Preamp works particularly well when used to push a clean amplifier into natural breakup.

The JHS Packrat is a multi-mode distortion pedal that recreates several famous RAT-style circuits in a single enclosure. Each mode represents a different historical version of the classic distortion design, allowing players to explore subtle variations in clipping, compression, and tonal response. The Packrat can produce everything from gritty overdrive to aggressive distortion while maintaining the distinctive RAT-style character. Its versatility makes it an appealing option for guitarists who appreciate the evolution of classic distortion circuits. With multiple voicings available, it effectively places decades of RAT-style tones in one pedal.

The JHS PG-14 is a signature distortion pedal developed in collaboration with guitarist Paul Gilbert. It combines elements of distortion, overdrive, and fuzz to create a versatile high-gain sound with unique character. The pedal includes a powerful EQ section that allows players to sculpt the midrange and overall tonal balance. This flexibility makes it possible to dial in tight rhythm tones or thick, expressive lead sounds. The PG-14 captures Paul Gilbert’s energetic playing style while offering enough tonal range for many different genres.

The JHS 3 Series Phaser delivers classic analog-style phasing effects with smooth, musical modulation. It can add subtle movement to clean guitar tones or create dramatic swirling textures when used with distortion. The rate control adjusts the speed of the modulation while the depth control determines how pronounced the phase effect becomes. A toggle switch introduces additional tonal variation, expanding the available phaser sounds. Designed with simplicity in mind, the pedal offers high-quality modulation without unnecessary complexity.

The JHS Prestige is a compact clean boost pedal designed to increase signal level while preserving the natural tone of the guitar. It provides a transparent volume increase that can push amplifiers into natural breakup or simply make solos stand out in a mix. Despite its simple single-knob design, the pedal offers impressive headroom and clarity. It can also add a subtle sparkle to clean tones when used as an always-on enhancer. The Prestige is a straightforward yet powerful tool for shaping dynamics within a pedalboard setup.

The JHS Pulp N Peel v4 is a versatile compressor pedal designed to provide smooth sustain and refined dynamic control. It enhances note clarity while evening out the overall signal level, making it particularly useful for clean guitar tones and expressive lead playing. The pedal also includes a blend control that allows players to mix compressed and dry signals for more natural results. Additional tone shaping options help maintain brightness and articulation. With its flexible design and studio-quality compression, the Pulp N Peel v4 is widely used by both guitarists and bass players.

The JHS 3 Series Reverb is a straightforward ambient effects pedal designed to add depth and spatial dimension to guitar tones. It provides smooth reverb tails that can range from subtle room ambience to expansive atmospheric textures. The mix and decay controls allow players to fine-tune how present the effect becomes in the signal. A toggle switch expands the tonal range by introducing additional voicing options. The pedal offers professional-quality ambience while maintaining the simplicity and affordability that defines the JHS 3 Series lineup.

The JHS 3 Series Rotary Chorus blends traditional chorus modulation with rotary speaker-style movement. The effect recreates the swirling character of vintage rotating speaker cabinets while maintaining the lush modulation of a chorus pedal. Players can adjust the speed and intensity of the modulation to achieve subtle shimmer or dramatic rotating textures. This makes the pedal suitable for classic rock, psychedelic music, and ambient styles. The Rotary Chorus offers a unique hybrid modulation effect in a compact and easy-to-use format.

The JHS 3 Series Screamer is an overdrive pedal inspired by the classic Tube Screamer sound. It delivers the familiar midrange boost and smooth clipping that guitarists associate with vintage overdrive circuits. Players can dial in everything from subtle boost to warm blues-style drive depending on the gain setting. A toggle switch adds additional tonal variation, allowing the pedal to cover a broader range of overdrive textures. The Screamer 3 Series offers classic drive tones while maintaining the simple design philosophy of the series.

The JHS The Kilt v2 is a signature overdrive pedal created in collaboration with guitarist StuG. It blends elements of overdrive, fuzz, and distortion to create a uniquely versatile gain structure. Multiple toggles allow players to modify clipping and gain stages, significantly expanding the tonal possibilities of the pedal. The Kilt v2 can move from subtle breakup to thick, saturated drive depending on the settings. This flexibility makes it a favorite among players who enjoy experimenting with different gain textures.

The JHS The Violet is a distortion pedal inspired by rare vintage circuits known for their aggressive midrange and distinctive character. It delivers a thick and powerful distortion sound that works well for classic rock and modern alternative tones. The pedal maintains strong note articulation even with higher gain settings. Its tonal balance allows it to cut through dense mixes while still retaining warmth. The Violet offers a unique voice that stands apart from more common distortion designs.

The JHS The Violet Black features the same distinctive distortion circuit as the original Violet but with an alternate aesthetic design. It produces rich harmonic distortion with strong midrange presence and excellent note clarity. The pedal can deliver everything from crunchy rhythm tones to powerful lead sounds depending on the gain settings. Its balanced EQ structure allows it to work well with many different guitar and amplifier combinations. The Violet Black offers the same expressive distortion character with a unique visual style.

The JHS Tidewater is a tremolo pedal inspired by the smooth amplitude modulation found in vintage American amplifiers. It delivers warm, rhythmic volume pulses that add movement and character to clean guitar tones. The pedal’s simple control layout allows players to quickly adjust the speed and depth of the tremolo effect. Its musical response makes it ideal for classic rock, surf, and indie styles. The Tidewater captures the essence of vintage tremolo while maintaining modern reliability and ease of use.

The JHS Whitey Tighty is a compact compressor pedal designed to deliver smooth dynamic control without coloring your guitar’s natural tone. Inspired by classic studio-style compression circuits, this pedal offers a simple yet powerful three-knob layout with Volume, Compression, and Blend controls. The blend knob allows players to mix compressed and dry signals for transparent parallel compression, maintaining pick attack while adding sustain and consistency. Perfect for clean tones, country picking, funk rhythm, and subtle lead sustain, the Whitey Tighty fits easily on crowded pedalboards thanks to its mini enclosure. It works equally well in front of clean amps or stacked with overdrive pedals. Guitarists who want polished dynamics without complicated controls will appreciate the musical response and clarity this pedal provides. Whether you're tightening rhythm parts or adding sustain to solos, the JHS Whitey Tighty delivers studio-quality compression in a pedalboard-friendly format.

The Joyfx Custom Pedals 1981 Mini Distortion captures the punchy and articulate character inspired by classic boutique distortion circuits in a compact format. Designed for players who want tight low end, clear mids, and responsive gain, this pedal excels at modern rock, alternative, and dynamic lead tones. The control layout is simple yet flexible, typically including gain, tone, and volume adjustments that allow the pedal to move from edge-of-breakup grit to saturated distortion. Despite its small footprint, the 1981 Mini Distortion retains excellent note separation and touch sensitivity, making it suitable for stacking with other drives or pushing a tube amp. Joyfx focuses on handmade craftsmanship and reliable components, ensuring consistent performance both in studio and on stage. For players seeking boutique-style distortion tones in a pedalboard-friendly enclosure, the Joyfx 1981 Mini Distortion delivers clarity, punch, and modern drive character.

pedalplex_id: Joyfx Custom Pedals 1981 Mini Distortion - Black
seo_description: The Joyfx Custom Pedals 1981 Mini Distortion Black edition delivers the same articulate boutique-style distortion as the standard model but with a sleek black finish. Designed to emulate the tight response and clarity of modern boutique distortion circuits, it offers dynamic gain that ranges from crunchy rhythm textures to saturated lead tones. The pedal maintains excellent note definition even with higher gain settings, making it ideal for players who rely on clarity within complex chord voicings. Its compact enclosure saves valuable pedalboard space while still providing intuitive gain, tone, and volume controls for quick sound shaping. The circuit responds well to picking dynamics and works beautifully when stacked with overdrives or boosts. Whether used as a primary distortion or a gain stage in a larger setup, the Joyfx 1981 Mini Distortion Black edition offers modern drive tones, strong articulation, and a stylish finish for players who want boutique character in a small format.

pedalplex_id: Joyfx Custom Pedals 1981 Mini Distortion - White
seo_description: The Joyfx Custom Pedals 1981 Mini Distortion White edition provides the same responsive boutique-inspired distortion found in the original model, packaged in a striking white enclosure. Designed for modern players who want punchy gain and excellent note clarity, this pedal produces tight low end, focused mids, and a smooth top end that works well for rock, indie, and alternative tones. With straightforward gain, tone, and volume controls, it’s easy to dial in everything from crunchy rhythm sounds to singing lead distortion. The circuit remains highly dynamic and responds well to guitar volume adjustments, allowing expressive control directly from the instrument. Its compact format makes it ideal for smaller pedalboards or minimalist rigs. Built with attention to detail by Joyfx Custom Pedals, the 1981 Mini Distortion White edition combines boutique-style tone, responsive gain structure, and a clean visual aesthetic.

The Joyfx Custom Pedals 1981 + Morning Glory Distortion combines two popular drive styles into a single powerful unit. One side is inspired by modern boutique distortion circuits delivering tight, articulate gain, while the other channel emulates transparent Bluesbreaker-style overdrive tones similar to the Morning Glory. This dual-drive configuration allows players to use each circuit independently or stack them for richer, layered gain textures. The result is a versatile pedal capable of producing everything from light breakup and dynamic edge-of-drive tones to thick modern distortion. Guitarists can dial in rhythm crunch, bluesy lead sustain, or stacked high-gain sounds depending on their setup. The pedal retains excellent clarity and touch sensitivity, making it suitable for studio work and live performance alike. With its flexible dual-channel design, the Joyfx 1981 + Morning Glory Distortion offers a wide palette of drive tones for players who want multiple gain stages in one compact pedal.

The Joyfx Custom Pedals Atlas Comp is a versatile compression pedal designed to enhance sustain, balance dynamics, and add polish to guitar and bass tones. Built with a focus on transparency and musical response, the Atlas Comp smooths out uneven playing while preserving the natural character of your instrument. The control set typically includes compression, volume, and tone shaping parameters that allow precise adjustment for different playing styles. From subtle leveling for clean rhythm parts to pronounced squash for funk or country lead lines, the pedal adapts easily to a wide range of musical contexts. Its responsive design works well both at the beginning of the signal chain and when paired with drive pedals. Joyfx’s attention to build quality ensures reliable performance in studio and live environments. For players looking to add sustain and clarity without sacrificing tone, the Atlas Comp delivers smooth and controllable compression.

The Joyfx Custom Pedals Clean Boost is a straightforward yet powerful pedal designed to increase signal level without altering the core tone of your guitar. Ideal for pushing tube amplifiers into natural breakup or elevating lead parts in a mix, this pedal provides transparent gain with minimal coloration. The simple control layout allows players to quickly dial in the desired boost level, making it perfect for live performance situations where reliability and ease of use are essential. When placed before drive pedals, the Clean Boost can add saturation and sustain, while positioning it after overdrives increases overall volume for solos. Joyfx’s build quality ensures low noise and consistent performance across different rigs. Whether used to push an amp, balance levels between guitars, or add presence to lead lines, the Joyfx Clean Boost delivers clear and powerful signal enhancement.

pedalplex_id: Joyfx Custom Pedals Clean Boost - Black
seo_description: The Joyfx Custom Pedals Clean Boost Black edition offers the same transparent gain as the standard model while featuring a sleek black enclosure. Designed to provide pure signal amplification without tonal coloration, this pedal is perfect for pushing tube amplifiers, enhancing lead lines, or driving other pedals in the signal chain. Its straightforward design focuses on delivering clean headroom and reliable output gain. Guitarists can use it to increase sustain, tighten drive pedals, or simply boost overall volume for solos during live performances. When placed before distortion pedals, it can add extra saturation and harmonic richness, while placing it after drives increases stage volume without altering the character of the tone. Built with quality components by Joyfx Custom Pedals, the Clean Boost Black edition delivers clarity, reliability, and practical performance in a compact pedalboard-friendly format.

The Joyfx Custom Pedals Daytone Overdrive is a smooth and dynamic overdrive pedal designed to enhance the natural character of your guitar and amplifier. With a responsive gain structure, the pedal moves easily from subtle edge-of-breakup warmth to rich, singing overdrive tones. Its design emphasizes clarity and touch sensitivity, allowing players to control saturation using picking dynamics or the guitar’s volume knob. The control layout provides intuitive adjustments for gain, tone, and output level, making it easy to dial in blues, classic rock, and modern edge-of-breakup sounds. The Daytone Overdrive works well as a standalone drive or as part of a stacked gain setup with boosts and distortion pedals. Built with attention to detail by Joyfx Custom Pedals, this overdrive delivers smooth harmonic response and musical dynamics suited for both studio recording and live performance.

pedalplex_id: Joyfx Custom Pedals DRVX - Dual - 1981 Distortion
seo_description: The Joyfx Custom Pedals DRVX Dual 1981 Distortion is a powerful dual-channel distortion pedal designed for players who want layered gain options in a single unit. Inspired by modern boutique distortion circuits, each channel delivers tight, articulate gain with strong note separation and responsive dynamics. The dual configuration allows guitarists to use each side independently or stack them for higher gain saturation and expanded tonal complexity. This makes the DRVX particularly useful for switching between rhythm crunch and lead tones during live performances. Controls typically include independent gain, tone, and volume sections for each channel, providing extensive flexibility. The pedal maintains clarity even with heavy distortion settings, ensuring chords remain defined and leads cut through the mix. Built with the craftsmanship associated with Joyfx Custom Pedals, the DRVX Dual 1981 Distortion is ideal for players seeking versatile modern distortion in a single pedal.

pedalplex_id: Joyfx Custom Pedals Duello Dual Overdrive
seo_description: The Joyfx Custom Pedals Duello Dual Overdrive combines two complementary overdrive circuits into a single versatile pedal. Each channel offers its own gain and tone shaping, allowing players to use them individually or stack them together for richer saturation and sustain. The dual-drive design makes the Duello particularly useful for guitarists who need multiple gain levels on stage without switching pedals. One side can provide light breakup or transparent boost, while the other can deliver thicker overdrive tones suitable for lead playing. When stacked, the circuits create harmonically complex drive sounds that remain clear and articulate. The pedal responds well to picking dynamics and guitar volume adjustments, giving players expressive control over their tone. Built with Joyfx’s attention to quality and detail, the Duello Dual Overdrive is an excellent choice for musicians seeking flexibility and dynamic drive textures in a single unit.

pedalplex_id: Joyfx Custom Pedals Footswitch Aux Hx Stomp / PodGO
seo_description: The Joyfx Custom Pedals Footswitch Aux for HX Stomp and POD Go is a practical accessory designed to expand the control capabilities of popular multi-effects processors. By adding external footswitch functionality, this device allows players to trigger additional presets, effects, or tap tempo commands without navigating menus during performance. The footswitch integrates easily with compatible devices such as the HX Stomp and POD Go through the auxiliary control input. Its rugged construction ensures reliable operation on stage, while the compact footprint keeps pedalboards organized. Musicians who rely on multi-effects processors often need additional real-time control, and this auxiliary footswitch provides a simple solution. Whether switching snapshots, toggling effects blocks, or controlling tap tempo, the Joyfx Aux Footswitch enhances workflow and performance flexibility for modern digital rigs.

The Joyfx Custom Pedals Fuzz War is a powerful fuzz pedal designed to deliver aggressive, saturated tones with massive sustain and thick harmonic character. Inspired by classic high-gain fuzz circuits, this pedal produces a wide range of textures from gritty vintage fuzz to heavy, modern saturation. The circuit emphasizes strong low-end response and cutting mids, ensuring that the fuzz tone remains present in dense band mixes. Controls allow players to shape gain intensity, tone balance, and output level, making the pedal adaptable for different guitars and amplifiers. When paired with overdrives or boosts, the Fuzz War can produce even more extreme textures and layered distortion sounds. Built with Joyfx Custom Pedals’ commitment to quality craftsmanship, this fuzz pedal is ideal for players seeking bold, expressive fuzz tones for rock, alternative, and experimental music.

pedalplex_id: Joyfx Custom Pedals High Voltage Overdrive
seo_description: The Joyfx Custom Pedals High Voltage Overdrive is designed to provide dynamic drive tones with enhanced headroom and clarity. The pedal emphasizes articulate note definition and responsive gain that reacts naturally to picking dynamics. With adjustable gain, tone, and output controls, players can dial in everything from light edge-of-breakup warmth to more saturated overdrive suitable for lead playing. The circuit maintains strong presence and harmonic richness without becoming muddy, making it particularly effective when pushing a clean tube amplifier. It also stacks well with other drives and boosts, allowing guitarists to build layered gain structures on their pedalboards. Built with attention to detail by Joyfx Custom Pedals, the High Voltage Overdrive offers a balance of transparency, punch, and musical drive that suits a wide variety of styles.

The Joyfx Custom Pedals JanRay Drive is an overdrive inspired by the smooth and transparent tones of boutique low-gain drive circuits. Designed to enhance the natural character of your guitar and amplifier, the pedal delivers warm breakup, rich harmonic response, and excellent note clarity. Its responsive gain structure allows players to move from subtle edge-of-breakup tones to thicker blues and rock overdrive. Controls typically include gain, tone, and volume adjustments for shaping the sound precisely. The JanRay style circuit is known for its ability to retain the feel of the original amp tone while adding musical saturation and sustain. It works exceptionally well with single-coil and humbucker guitars alike and stacks beautifully with other overdrive or boost pedals. The Joyfx JanRay Drive offers dynamic response and boutique-style tone for players seeking expressive low-to-medium gain sounds.

pedalplex_id: Joyfx Custom Pedals JanRay Drive - Black
seo_description: The Joyfx Custom Pedals JanRay Drive Black edition delivers the same smooth and transparent overdrive as the original model while featuring a sleek black enclosure. Inspired by classic boutique low-gain drive circuits, it enhances the natural tone of your guitar and amplifier without masking the core character of the instrument. The pedal provides warm breakup, balanced mids, and a smooth high-end response that works beautifully for blues, pop, and classic rock tones. Its intuitive control layout allows players to easily shape gain levels, tone balance, and output volume. The circuit responds dynamically to picking attack and guitar volume adjustments, allowing expressive control directly from the instrument. Whether used as a subtle boost, a main overdrive, or stacked with other pedals, the Joyfx JanRay Drive Black edition offers clarity, warmth, and musical responsiveness.

pedalplex_id: Joyfx Custom Pedals Killer Scream Overdrive
seo_description: The Joyfx Custom Pedals Killer Scream Overdrive is inspired by the iconic Tube Screamer style circuit known for its mid-focused drive and smooth clipping character. Designed for players seeking classic blues and rock overdrive tones, the pedal delivers tight low end, warm mids, and a slightly compressed feel that helps lead lines stand out in a mix. Its gain structure ranges from subtle boost and edge-of-breakup tones to thicker overdrive suitable for rhythm and lead playing. The familiar control layout allows easy adjustment of gain, tone, and output volume. Tube Screamer style pedals are widely used to push tube amplifiers or tighten high-gain distortion tones. The Joyfx Killer Scream Overdrive captures that recognizable character while offering reliable construction and pedalboard-friendly performance.

pedalplex_id: Joyfx Custom Pedals King Blues - Blues Power Clone
seo_description: The Joyfx Custom Pedals King Blues Blues Power Clone delivers smooth low-gain overdrive inspired by classic blues drive circuits. The pedal emphasizes warmth, clarity, and dynamic response, making it well suited for expressive blues and vintage rock tones. At lower gain settings it adds subtle harmonic richness and light breakup, while higher settings provide fuller overdrive with singing sustain. The circuit maintains strong note definition, allowing complex chords and melodic lines to remain clear even with added saturation. Players often use this style of overdrive to enhance the natural tone of tube amplifiers rather than drastically altering it. Built with careful component selection by Joyfx Custom Pedals, the King Blues Blues Power Clone offers musical drive textures and vintage-inspired tone shaping.

The Joyfx Custom Pedals KLONe Overdrive is inspired by the legendary Klon-style transparent overdrive circuit. Known for its ability to enhance guitar tone while preserving clarity, this pedal delivers a distinctive mid-focused boost and smooth overdrive that works well with a wide variety of amplifiers. At low gain settings, it acts as a powerful clean boost with subtle harmonic richness. Increasing the gain produces warm overdrive with excellent note definition and tight low end. The circuit blends clean and driven signals to maintain articulation and dynamic feel. Guitarists often use Klon-style pedals to push tube amplifiers, tighten other overdrives, or add presence to lead parts. Built with care by Joyfx Custom Pedals, the KLONe Overdrive provides classic transparent drive tones in a reliable and pedalboard-friendly format.

The pedal maintains clarity and dynamic response, ensuring chords remain defined even with layered drive. Built with attention to tone and reliability, the Joyfx Layla Dual OD Overdrive delivers versatile boutique-style drive tones suitable for blues, rock, and alternative styles.

pedalplex_id: Joyfx Custom Pedals LoveTones - 1981 + Morning G Distortion

The Bluesbreaker side excels for subtle breakup and dynamic rhythm tones, while the TS10 side adds focused gain ideal for solos and tighter distortion. Stacked together, they produce rich harmonic saturation with strong note clarity. Built with careful craftsmanship, the Joyfx Lovetones Bluesbreaker + TS10 Overdrive offers versatile tonal combinations for modern pedalboards.

The Joyo Power Supply JP05 is a reliable multi-output power supply designed to provide clean and stable power for guitar pedalboards. Featuring multiple isolated outputs, the unit allows musicians to power several pedals simultaneously while minimizing noise and ground loop issues. The JP05 is compatible with a wide variety of effects pedals including overdrive, distortion, modulation, and digital effects. Its compact design makes it easy to integrate into pedalboard setups without taking up excessive space. LED indicators help monitor power status for each output, providing visual confirmation during setup and performance. Built for reliability and convenience, the Joyo JP05 Power Supply is a practical solution for players who want organized and noise-free pedalboard power.

The Joyo Ultimate Drive is a popular overdrive pedal known for delivering powerful gain and amp-like saturation at an affordable price. Inspired by classic boutique overdrive circuits, the pedal offers a wide gain range that can move from crunchy rhythm tones to thick distortion-like drive. The control set includes gain, tone, and volume adjustments that allow players to shape the sound to match different guitars and amplifiers. The Keeley Abbey Chamber Verb is a studio-inspired reverb pedal designed to recreate the warm ambience of vintage chamber reverbs used in classic recording studios. Inspired by the iconic echo chambers found in legendary facilities like Abbey Road Studios, this pedal delivers rich, natural reverberation with musical depth and clarity. Guitarists can dial in subtle room ambience for clean tones or lush spatial textures that enhance lead playing and ambient soundscapes. The pedal features intuitive controls that shape the decay, tone, and mix of the reverb signal, allowing precise adjustments for different musical styles. The Abbey Chamber Verb works beautifully with clean amplifiers, modulation pedals, and delay effects, adding a sense of depth and dimension to the guitar signal. Built with Keeley’s reputation for high-quality engineering, this pedal provides studio-style reverb tones in a compact pedalboard format.

The Keeley Compressor Plus is one of the most respected compressor pedals in modern guitar gear. Building on Keeley’s legendary compressor design, the Plus version adds enhanced tone shaping and improved transparency. It features controls for sustain, level, blend, and tone, allowing players to precisely adjust compression characteristics while maintaining the natural dynamics of their instrument. A dedicated single-coil and humbucker switch optimizes the circuit for different pickup types. The pedal can deliver subtle studio-style compression for clean tones or more pronounced sustain for lead playing. Known for its quiet operation and musical response, the Compressor Plus has become a staple on professional pedalboards. Whether used for country, funk, pop, or rock, it provides smooth and reliable dynamic control.

The Keeley D&M Drive is a dual-channel overdrive and boost pedal created in collaboration with YouTube guitarists Dan and Mick. The pedal combines two complementary circuits: a powerful boost designed to push amplifiers and a dynamic overdrive capable of delivering rich harmonic saturation. Each side can be used independently or stacked for layered gain textures ranging from subtle breakup to full lead saturation. The D&M Drive maintains excellent note clarity and responds naturally to playing dynamics, making it ideal for expressive rhythm and lead tones. Its flexible design allows players to place the boost before or after the drive circuit for different tonal results. Built with Keeley’s high standards of craftsmanship, the D&M Drive offers versatile boutique-style drive tones.

The Keeley DS-9 Distortion delivers classic high-gain distortion tones with improved clarity and dynamic response. Players can dial in crunchy rhythm distortion or heavier lead tones using the intuitive gain, tone, and level controls. The Keeley Dynatrem Tremolo is a highly versatile tremolo pedal designed to recreate classic amplifier tremolo effects while adding modern control options. The pedal offers multiple waveform modes including harmonic tremolo, sine wave modulation, and dynamic tremolo that responds to playing intensity. This allows guitarists to achieve subtle vintage pulse, rhythmic chop, or expressive modulation that reacts to performance dynamics. The intuitive controls make it easy to adjust speed, depth, and waveform characteristics to match different musical styles. From classic surf tremolo to modern ambient textures, the Dynatrem delivers rich modulation with smooth transitions. Built with Keeley’s high-quality engineering, the pedal provides reliable performance and flexible tremolo tones for both studio and stage use.

pedalplex_id: Keeley Dyno my Roto Tri-Chorus Rotary Flange
seo_description: The Keeley Dyno My Roto Tri-Chorus Rotary Flange is a multi-modulation pedal inspired by the lush rack effects used in iconic studio recordings of the 1980s. The pedal combines three modulation styles—tri-chorus, rotary speaker simulation, and flanger—allowing players to explore a wide range of rich and spacious modulation textures. Each mode recreates the shimmering movement and depth associated with vintage rack processors used by legendary guitarists. The tri-chorus mode produces wide stereo-style chorus tones, while the rotary mode simulates the swirling sound of a rotating speaker cabinet. The flanger mode adds dramatic sweeping modulation. Designed with Keeley’s signature attention to detail, the Dyno My Roto brings classic studio modulation sounds to modern pedalboards.

pedalplex_id: Keeley Dyno my Roto Tri-Chorus Rotary Flange - Shocking Pink

The flanger mode adds dramatic movement for experimental tones. Perfect for players who want classic studio modulation sounds in pedal form, the Dyno My Roto Shocking Pink edition pairs boutique tone with bold visual style.

The Keeley Eccos Delay/Looper is a versatile delay pedal that combines high-quality digital delay with an advanced looper in a compact format. Designed to deliver both modern and vintage-style echoes, the pedal offers a wide range of delay textures including tape-style modulation and rhythmic digital repeats. The integrated looper provides extensive looping capabilities for songwriting, practice, and live performance. Guitarists can stack delay and loop layers while maintaining excellent clarity and sound quality. The Eccos also includes modulation controls that add warmth and movement to the delay repeats, emulating classic tape echo machines. With its intuitive interface and powerful features, the Keeley Eccos Delay/Looper is a highly flexible tool for creative guitarists.

The Keeley Eccos Delay/Looper Black edition features the same advanced delay and looping engine as the standard version but with a sleek black enclosure. The pedal delivers a wide range of delay textures including clean digital repeats and warm tape-style echoes enhanced by modulation controls. Its integrated looper allows musicians to capture phrases and build layered performances during practice or live shows. The Eccos is known for its high-fidelity signal path and intuitive interface, making it easy to switch between delay and looping functions. Built with Keeley’s commitment to quality, the Black edition provides versatile delay and looping capabilities in a pedalboard-friendly design.

The Keeley Eccos Delay/Looper Shell Pink edition offers the same powerful delay and looping features as the standard model with a distinctive pastel finish. The pedal provides high-quality digital delay with tape-style modulation options that add warmth and character to the repeats. The integrated looper allows players to record and layer phrases for creative performance and practice applications. Known for its intuitive controls and pristine audio quality, the Eccos makes it easy to explore complex delay patterns and looping textures. With its eye-catching Shell Pink enclosure and versatile functionality, this version combines boutique aesthetics with professional-grade performance.

The Keeley El Rey Dorado Overdrive is inspired by the powerful tone of classic Mesa-style amplifiers known for their thick midrange and saturated drive. The pedal delivers dynamic overdrive that can range from crunchy rhythm tones to full lead saturation. Its responsive circuitry maintains clarity even at higher gain settings, allowing chords and single-note lines to remain well defined. Players can shape the tone using intuitive gain, tone, and level controls to match different guitars and amplifier setups. The El Rey Dorado excels when pushing clean tube amps into rich harmonic overdrive. With its bold voice and versatile gain range, this pedal provides powerful drive tones suitable for modern rock and lead guitar work.

Known for its bold midrange and strong sustain, the El Rey Dorado captures the character of classic high-gain amplifiers while remaining responsive to picking dynamics. The limited edition finish makes this version especially appealing for collectors and Keeley fans. Built with Keeley’s renowned engineering quality, the Filaments Hi Gain Distortion is a versatile solution for modern heavy guitar tones.

The Keeley Fuzz Head is a hybrid fuzz pedal that blends vintage germanium fuzz character with modern clarity. Designed to provide warm and expressive fuzz tones, the pedal can produce everything from subtle overdrive textures to classic saturated fuzz sounds. The circuit responds dynamically to guitar volume adjustments, allowing players to clean up the tone for more controlled drive. Unlike some traditional fuzz pedals, the Fuzz Head maintains strong note articulation and works well with a wide variety of amplifier setups. Its flexible design makes it suitable for blues, rock, and experimental guitar styles. Built with Keeley’s signature attention to detail, the Fuzz Head offers classic fuzz character with improved versatility.

The Keeley Fuzz Head Blue edition delivers the same hybrid germanium fuzz circuit as the original model while featuring a distinctive blue enclosure. With its expressive tone and reliable construction, the Fuzz Head Blue edition offers classic fuzz character in a visually striking design.

The Keeley Halo Core Echo is a streamlined version of the acclaimed Halo delay algorithm developed with guitarist Andy Timmons. Designed to deliver lush dual-echo delay textures, the pedal recreates the rhythmic and ambient delay patterns used in Timmons’ signature sound. The Halo Core focuses on the essential controls needed to create spacious echoes with warm modulation and clear repeats. Guitarists can easily dial in rhythmic delay patterns that add depth to clean tones or atmospheric layers to lead playing. The pedal maintains pristine signal quality and integrates seamlessly with other effects. With its elegant design and signature delay tone, the Halo Core Echo offers studio-grade echo textures in a compact pedal.

The Keeley Halo Dual Echo is a sophisticated delay pedal created in collaboration with guitarist Andy Timmons. The pedal features a dual-delay engine capable of producing complex rhythmic echo patterns that create depth and movement in guitar tones. Each delay line can be precisely controlled, allowing players to craft layered echoes with studio-quality clarity. Built-in modulation adds warmth and subtle movement reminiscent of vintage tape delays. The Halo Dual Echo is particularly effective for ambient textures, spacious lead tones, and modern atmospheric guitar sounds. With its powerful delay architecture and intuitive controls, the pedal delivers professional-grade echo effects in a compact format.

The Keeley Manis Overdrive is a dynamic drive pedal designed to deliver rich harmonic saturation with excellent clarity and touch sensitivity. The circuit provides a wide gain range that moves from subtle breakup to powerful overdrive suitable for lead playing. Known for its responsive feel, the pedal reacts naturally to picking intensity and guitar volume adjustments. The tone shaping controls allow players to tailor the frequency response for different guitars and amplifier setups. Whether used as a main drive pedal or stacked with boosts and distortions, the Manis Overdrive produces expressive and musical gain textures. Built with Keeley’s renowned craftsmanship, the pedal offers boutique drive tones for modern guitarists.

The Keeley Manis Overdrive Plasmaetic Purple edition features the same dynamic drive circuit as the original model in a striking purple finish. The tone shaping controls make it easy to adapt the pedal to different rigs and musical contexts. pedalplex_id: Keeley OAXA Dual True Stereo Phaser
seo_description: The Keeley OAXA Dual True Stereo Phaser is a sophisticated modulation pedal designed to deliver immersive stereo phasing effects. Featuring dual phaser engines, the pedal creates wide spatial movement that expands across the stereo field when connected to two amplifiers or recording channels. Players can explore subtle vintage phase textures or dramatic sweeping modulation depending on the settings. The pedal’s controls allow precise adjustment of speed, depth, and resonance for a wide variety of sonic possibilities. With its true stereo architecture and high-quality signal path, the OAXA Phaser is well suited for studio recording, live performance, and ambient guitar setups.

The Keeley Octa Psi Fuzz is a unique octave fuzz pedal designed to deliver vintage-style fuzz tones with an added octave effect. The pedal produces thick, saturated fuzz while generating an upper octave harmonic that creates a distinctive lead sound. This effect is especially pronounced when playing higher notes or single-note melodies. The Octa Psi can produce classic psychedelic fuzz tones, aggressive garage rock textures, or experimental sounds depending on the settings. Its responsive circuit reacts well to guitar dynamics and pickup selection. With its bold character and expressive octave effect, the Octa Psi Fuzz offers creative fuzz tones for adventurous guitarists.

This is particularly useful during live performances where quick changes are required. The remote switch integrates seamlessly with compatible Keeley pedals and features rugged construction for stage reliability. Its compact design allows easy placement on pedalboards. The Keyztone Exchanger Pro Modeler is a sophisticated tone-shaping pedal designed to emulate the sonic character of multiple guitars and pickups in a live or studio setup. Instead of traditional amp modeling, the Exchanger focuses on transforming your instrument’s tonal identity, allowing a single guitar to convincingly reproduce the sound of various classic instruments. Advanced DSP technology analyzes and reshapes the signal to recreate different pickup responses and body resonances. This makes it particularly valuable for session musicians and touring guitarists who need maximum tonal versatility without changing guitars. Controls allow users to blend and fine-tune modeled sounds, maintaining the dynamics and feel of the original instrument. The pedal integrates easily into modern pedalboards and works well with both clean and driven amplifier setups. The Keyztone Exchanger Pro Modeler is a powerful solution for players seeking flexible guitar tone modeling and expanded sonic possibilities.

The Klon Centaur Original is one of the most legendary overdrive pedals ever created. Designed by Bill Finnegan in the 1990s, the Centaur is renowned for its transparent overdrive character and unique ability to enhance an amplifier’s natural tone rather than masking it. Its circuitry blends a clean signal with a driven signal, preserving clarity and articulation even at higher gain settings. Guitarists value the Centaur for its rich harmonic response, dynamic touch sensitivity, and exceptional performance as a boost pushing tube amplifiers into natural breakup. The pedal’s simple control layout—Gain, Treble, and Output—makes dialing in tones straightforward while still offering a wide range of sounds from clean boost to smooth overdrive. Because of its limited production and cult status, original units have become highly collectible among guitar enthusiasts. The Klon Centaur remains a benchmark for transparent overdrive pedals and continues to influence countless modern designs.

This early version features the distinctive gold enclosure without the famous Centaur graphic, making it particularly collectible among enthusiasts. Guitarists often use the Centaur as a clean boost or as a smooth overdrive pushing tube amplifiers into natural saturation. The pedal’s Gain, Treble, and Output controls offer a wide tonal range while remaining easy to use. Thanks to its musical response and legendary reputation, the Klon Centaur Original Gold No Logo remains one of the most revered boutique overdrive pedals ever produced.

pedalplex_id: LAZY J x ThorpyFx THE J Analog Amp Emulator
seo_description: The LAZY J x ThorpyFx THE J Analog Amp Emulator is a high-end analog preamp pedal designed to replicate the feel and tone of classic tube amplifiers. Developed as a collaboration between Lazy J Amps and ThorpyFX, the pedal delivers rich harmonic saturation, responsive dynamics, and authentic amp-like breakup. Instead of relying on digital modeling, THE J uses carefully engineered analog circuitry to recreate the touch sensitivity and warmth of vintage amplifiers. Controls allow players to shape gain, EQ, and output levels for a wide range of tones, from clean boost to full overdrive. The pedal works equally well as a standalone amp emulator, a studio tone-shaping tool, or as a front-end preamp pushing a traditional guitar amplifier. Built with premium components and rugged construction, THE J is designed for professional musicians seeking authentic amplifier tone in a pedal format.

Featuring fast detection and accurate chromatic tuning, the AT-07 ensures guitars and basses remain perfectly in tune during performances. The bright LED display provides clear visibility even in low-light stage environments, making quick adjustments easy between songs. True bypass switching preserves the integrity of the instrument’s signal when the tuner is not engaged. Its durable metal enclosure is built to withstand regular gigging and pedalboard use. The Lekato AT-07 supports standard guitar and bass tunings as well as alternate tuning setups. Simple operation and dependable performance make it a practical addition to any pedalboard.

By controlling peaks and boosting quieter notes, the pedal helps create a more balanced and polished tone. Guitarists use compressors like the R Comp to achieve smooth clean sounds, improved note definition, and longer sustain for lead playing. Simple controls allow adjustment of compression intensity, output level, and tonal balance. The pedal works well with both clean and overdriven amplifier setups and can enhance funk rhythm playing, country picking, and expressive lead lines. Built with a durable enclosure and compact design, the Lekato R Comp fits easily on most pedalboards. It offers an affordable solution for players seeking consistent dynamics and improved sustain.

Using Line 6 digital modeling technology, the AM4 provides access to a range of iconic amp tones including vintage clean amps, classic British crunch, and modern high-gain sounds. Players can easily switch between models and adjust gain, EQ, and output levels to match their rig. The pedal works well as a direct tone-shaping tool or as a front-end gain stage into a clean amplifier. Rugged construction and intuitive controls make it suitable for both live performance and studio use. The Line 6 AM4 Amp Modeler offers guitarists a flexible solution for exploring multiple amplifier sounds within a single pedal.

The pedal provides multiple presets that can be accessed instantly during performance, making it a favorite among touring musicians. Additional features include a built-in looper, tap tempo, and extended delay times suitable for ambient soundscapes. The DL4’s warm delay tones and flexible controls allow guitarists to create everything from subtle slapback echoes to expansive atmospheric textures.
